name: Vitality Enhancement
description: Increases max health of all squad members.

name: Stamina Enhancement
description: Increases sprint stamina for all squad members.

name: Hellpod Space Optimization
description: Squad members land with full ammo, grenades, and stims.

name: UAV Recon Booster
description: Increases minimap reveal radius for all Helldivers.

name: Localization Confusion
description: Delays enemy patrols calling in reinforcements.

name: Motivational Shocks
description: Stim usage also increases sprint speed briefly.

name: Expert Extraction Pilot
description: Reduces the time the Pelican takes to arrive.

name: Experimental Infusion
description: Stim overcures, providing a short period of invulnerability.

name: Muscle Enhancement
description: Reduces movement penalty from difficult terrain.
